name: Skill Market (技能市场)
description: 本地技能市场：搜索、热门/高评分排序与统计概览。

routeSpecs.description: Search the local skill market catalog.
List top local skill market entries by popularity or rating.
Return aggregate local skill market statistics.

metadata.note: Natively owns /v1/market/search, /v1/market/top and /v1/market/stats through the Pack Runtime gate. Remote SkillHub discovery/install/update is owned by yunque.pack.skillhub.
metadata.usageSurface: 技能页与本地技能市场
metadata.example1: 搜索本地可用技能并按热度或评分排序。
metadata.example2: 查看技能市场统计，判断哪些能力更常用。
metadata.example3: 为后续远程技能生态提供统一查询入口。
